name: Crafted Coast
notes: Issues: very few internal pages (0 — thin site); very few images (0 — minimal visual content); no contact form found. Rating: NEEDS_WORK (score 62)

review_snippets.name: Samantha M.
review_snippets.text: Josh and his team did an amazing job on my fence! They came out and completed an estimate, allowed me to change my mind 100x and they were beyond courteous & patient. They got the job done in 2 days and it looks beautiful! I highly recommend them for your fencing needs. Thank you

review_snippets.name: Louis D.
review_snippets.text: These have been the worst group of people I have ever used.  They delayed the work causing me to be inconvenienced for over a month.  The gate was not ordered on time, and I had to pull a piece of wire across the opening for over a month to prevent my dogs from getting in the str

review_snippets.name: chelsea d.
review_snippets.text: Josh and his team did a wonderful job on my fence in one day. I’m referring to my family and friends.

review_snippets.name: Rachel T.
review_snippets.text: I had a fence repaired, the two gentleman that cane out where very respectful,  and considerate of my property.  They finished in a timely manner. One of the men, Daniel was so respectful and had the sweetest smile and was so well mannered and his other associate Zack was as well

review_snippets.name: Halie M.
review_snippets.text:
I recently hired Crafted Coast LLC to install a new fence around my property, and I couldn't be more pleased with the results. From the initial consultation to the final installation, their team was professional, courteous, and efficient.

The quality of the materials used is top
